prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate the transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] list_assets — Select a healthy unit (a transformer with health_status = 0) and a degraded unit (a transformer with health_status = 1) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — For the healthy unit (T-005), list available sensor channels (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the healthy unit (T-005), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [iot] list_sensors — For the degraded unit (T-013), list available sensor channels (depends on steps [2])
  Step 6: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the degraded unit (T-013), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [4])
  Step 8: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [6])
  Step 9: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [7])
  Step 10: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [8])
  Step 11: [iot] list_assets — Correct health_status input for list_assets tool
  Step 12: [iot] list_assets — Select a healthy unit (a transformer with health_status = 0) and a degraded unit (a transformer with health_status = 1) (depends on steps [11])
  Step 13: [iot] list_sensors — For the healthy unit (T-005), list available sensor channels (depends on steps [12])
  Step 14: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the healthy unit (T-005), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [13])
  Step 15: [iot] list_sensors — For the degraded unit (T-013), list available sensor channels (depends on steps [12])
  Step 16: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the degraded unit (T-013), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [15])
  Step 17: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [14])
  Step 18: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [16])
  Step 19: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [17])
  Step 20: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [18])
